raw_candidates.label: AI Meeting Prep Copilot
raw_candidates.description: Helps operators prepare for recurring customer, investor, and hiring meetings.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: pre-meeting research, agenda shaping, and brief generation
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: turning recurring meeting preparation into a compounding operator advantage
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: collect context, draft brief, improve after each meeting
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Repeated operator pain around recurring prep work and fragmented context.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Operators want a repeated prep workflow, not just generic note-taking.

raw_candidates.label: AI Meeting Prep Assistant
raw_candidates.description: An assistant for recurring high-stakes meeting preparation.
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: improving high-stakes prep quality over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: collect context, generate brief, review outcomes, refine next time
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Same recurring operator need observed from a second angle.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Alias candidate for the same repeated meeting prep domain.

raw_candidates.label: Prompt Library For Teams
raw_candidates.description: A shared place to store prompts used by a team.
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Useful workflow, but still mostly a feature bucket.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: This sounds more like a workflow or feature set than a durable domain.

raw_candidates.label: Displaced Workers
raw_candidates.description: People hit by AI-driven job loss.
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Real audience, but not a domain by itself.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Persona group under macro pressure, not yet a repeated workflow domain.

raw_candidates.label: MCP Server Builder
raw_candidates.description: Tools that help developers build MCP servers faster.
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: define interface, scaffold server, test integration, iterate
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Already represented in the maintained benchmark universe.
